channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Georgia GOP Leaders Reject Governor's Call for 2028 Redistricting
item.description: Georgia's Republican legislative leaders on Wednesday rejected Gov. Brian Kemp's proposal to redraw congressional and legislative districts during a special session.

item.title: Trump Administration to Buy Back Another Energy Company's Offshore Wind Leases for Four More Projects
item.description: The Trump administration announced Wednesday it is buying back another energy company's U.S. offshore wind leases for four additional projects, bringing the total to...

item.title: WATCH: ICE Officer Rescues 6-Year-Old Girl from Pool Emergency
item.description: ICE officer Gregory Simmonds jumped fully clothed into a Florida pool to rescue a drowning 6-year-old, performing CPR until the child regained consciousness.

item.title: Senate Democrats Push Back on Oil Reserve Plan
item.description: Senate Democrats are opposing discussions between the Trump administration and an energy company about a proposed West Coast Strategic Petroleum Reserve...
